eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 10:09 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 10:09 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert - Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 3 GO NOW evacuation notice for zone JAC-127-A along Hwy 227 north to Taylor Rd, and Hwy 62 east to River Heights Rd due to Evans Creek Rd Fire. Monitor local news sources for evacuations and incident information.
